decision: Reject the direct edit. The generator may emit only a schema-valid report-only candidate bound to exact source bytes and revision, proposed owner, expiry, recovery, limitations, and non-claims.
evidenceRequired: Typed candidate decode and semantic policy pass.
Report-only fixture and direct-publication negative test pass.
limitations: The fixture proves the repository-local policy only; it does not run a scheduled scanner.
nonClaims: A scan finding or local docs check is not edit or publication authority.
rollbackRevocation: Quarantine or retract the candidate and restore the last-known-good documentation owner; no external revocation applies.
